The '''W-23 Star Hauler''', often simply known as '''W-23 Space Barge''', was an 80-meter-long transport built by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]].

{{Ship-stub}}

{{Cutstart}}
[[Corellian Translines]] used a version of the Star Hauler modified into the W-33 for passenger voyages.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
